summary: Iteration 8 complete - Testing new Capital Gains Tax Report feature for Indian tax system. All 15 backend tests passed. All UI components verified via Playwright. Tax calculation correct (STCG @15%, Cess @4%). Excel and PDF exports working.

issues: Minor React warning: <span> cannot be child of <option> - hydration warning in console, but UI works correctly

test_credentials: None required - uses public preview URL
seed_data_creation: Using existing 5 closed trades from March 2026 in FY 2025-26 with +₹12,853 P&L
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tax Reports feature fully working. Tax calculation: Net P&L ₹12,853 → STCG @15% = ₹1,928, Cess @4% = ₹77, Total Tax = ₹2,005. Monthly breakdown shows March 2026 with 5 trades. Excel (7.7KB) and PDF (3.1KB) exports verified with correct file signatures.

tested_features.1_tax_tab_exists: PASS - Tax Reports tab visible in tabs bar with data-testid='tax-tab'
tested_features.2_fy_selector: PASS - FY year dropdown visible with data-testid='fy-selector', options from 2027-28 to 2023-24
tested_features.3_view_toggle_buttons: PASS - Summary/Monthly buttons work with data-testid='view-summary-btn' and 'view-monthly-btn'
tested_features.4_summary_cards: PASS - 4 cards visible: Total Trades (5), Net P&L (+₹12,853), Tax Liability (₹2,005), F&O Turnover (₹12,853)
tested_features.5_tax_calculation_card: PASS - Shows Net Taxable Profit, STCG Tax @15%, Cess @4%, Total Tax Liability
tested_features.6_trading_summary_card: PASS - Shows Buy Value (₹99,750), Sell Value (₹1,12,603), Profit, Loss, Turnover, Audit Threshold
tested_features.7_monthly_table: PASS - Table with Month, Trades, Profit, Loss, Net P&L, Turnover, STCG Tax, Cess, Total Tax columns
tested_features.8_excel_export_button: PASS - Button visible with data-testid='export-excel-btn', API returns valid xlsx (PK signature)
tested_features.9_pdf_export_button: PASS - Button visible with data-testid='export-pdf-btn', API returns valid PDF (%PDF- signature)
tested_features.10_api_tax_report: PASS - GET /api/tax/report?fy_year=2025-26 returns complete tax calculation with total_tax_liability
tested_features.11_api_export_excel: PASS - GET /api/tax/export-excel returns valid xlsx file (7746 bytes)
tested_features.12_api_export_pdf: PASS - GET /api/tax/export-pdf returns valid PDF file (3181 bytes)
tested_features.13_disclaimer_text: PASS - Visible at bottom: 'This report is auto-generated. Consult a CA for actual tax filing. ITR-3 applicable.'
tested_features.14_other_tabs_regression: PASS - Dashboard, News, Signals, Trades, History, Analytics tabs all working

api_verification.GET /api/tax/export-excel?fy_year=2025-2: 200 OK - Returns xlsx file (7746 bytes, PK signature)
api_verification.GET /api/tax/export-pdf?fy_year=2025-26: 200 OK - Returns PDF file (3181 bytes, %PDF- signature)
api_verification.GET /api/tax/report?fy_year=2024-25: 200 OK - Returns empty report for FY with no trades
api_verification.GET /api/tax/report?fy_year=2027-28: 200 OK - Returns zero values for future FY
api_verification.GET /api/trades/history: 200 OK - with filters and summary (no regression)
